subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto the call of Him Who is wronged, Who proclaimeth from the precincts of the Prison: "There is none other God but He." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین ان استمع ندآء المظلوم الذی ینادی من شطر السجن انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
